problem_solved: Health plans and providers lack tools to identify and address transportation barriers that prevent patients from accessing care
solution_description: NEMT (Non-Emergency Medical Transportation) management platform for health plans and providers. Coordinates rides to medical appointments, manages transportation benefits, and provides analytics on transportation utilization. Integrates with Medicaid managed care and Medicare Advantage
traction_signals: Serves Medicaid and Medicare Advantage plans
notes: NEMT platform competing with Modivcare. High Varden fit - addresses transportation barrier to care. Important SDOH infrastructure for Medicaid populations. Focus on transportation as social determinant
